🚀 Big Launches.title: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system
🚀 Big Launches.summary: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Apple approves Poke as the first AI agent on its Messages for Business platform
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Poke, the startup that lets people use AI agents through simple text messages, has become the first AI agent approved for Apple’s Messages for Business platform.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Meta rolls out a new AI creator assistant on Facebook
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Creators often have to parse through charts and dashboards to understand their performance, but with the new AI assistant, they can get quick answers to questions like "When should I post?" and "What are people saying in my comments?"

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Global Enterprise AI

🎯 Interview Edge.title: AI leaders call for tougher protections against AI-aided bioweapons
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Some of the AI industry's biggest rivals have put their many, many grievances aside for a common cause: making it harder for people to use their technology to develop biological weapons.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Amazon develops a warehouse robot that workers can speak to
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Amazon has announced a new version of its fully autonomous warehouse robot, Proteus, that will interact using language instead of code.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: AI leaders call for tougher protections against AI-aided bioweapons
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Some of the AI industry's biggest rivals have put their many, many grievances aside for a common cause: making it harder for people to use their technology to develop biological weapons.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Let us filter AI slop, you cowards
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: It's almost impossible to avoid seeing AI-generated content online, but it doesn't have to be this way.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: TSMC struggles to keep up with AI demand
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. - the world's biggest semiconductor-maker - is struggling to meet demands from American customers even with its factory buildout in the US.

tool_of_day.title: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety
tool_of_day.summary: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Global Enterprise AI

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more responsible and secure practices, with companies like Amazon and Meta investing in AI-powered automation and content authentication.
